response.justification: Highly experienced full-stack engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, and embedded systems, well above the 6+ year requirement. Strong match on TypeScript/Node.js/React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Git, with current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks) that directly aligns with the role. Solid testing/TDD discipline and community contributions reinforce craftsmanship. Minor gaps in explicitly named tools (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin) are easily bridgeable given the breadth of polyglot experience.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matches a key requirement
Strong testing culture (TDD, workshops, own assertion/test-runner libraries)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned (Java present, but Kotlin is the secondary stack)
Significant career investment in DLang may signal preference mismatch with primary stack
